mapper.insert: insert into sb_work_group_user (group_id, user_id, customer_id, create_by, create_time) values (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{customerId}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select user_id from sb_work_group_user where group_id = #{groupId} and delete_time is null
select group_id from sb_work_group_user where user_id = #{userId} and (customer_id = #{customerId} or #{customerId} is null) and delete_time is null
mapper.update: update sb_work_group_user set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId} and user_id = #{userId} and delete_time is null
mapper.select: select count(1) from sb_work_group_user where group_id = #{groupId} and user_id = #{userId} and delete_time is null
